search.query: |inputlookup $field1$.csv |eval timenow=now() |rex field=bucket "db_(?<epoch_end>.+?)_" |eval nowstring=strftime(now(), "%Y-%m-%d") |eval bucketage=timenow-epoch_end | eval years = round(bucketage/31540000,0) | eval months = round(bucketage/2628000,0) | eval weeks = round(bucketage/604800,0) | eval days = round(bucketage/86400,0) | eval hours = round(bucketage/3600,0) |table bucket hours days weeks months years |stats count

single.title: This metric is derived from the last event written to the bucket.

search.query: |inputlookup $field1$.csv |eval timenow=now() |rex field=bucket "db_(?<epoch_end>.+?)_" |eval nowstring=strftime(now(), "%Y-%m-%d") |eval bucketage=timenow-epoch_end | eval years = round(bucketage/31540000,0) | eval months = round(bucketage/2628000,0) | eval weeks = round(bucketage/604800,0) | eval days = round(bucketage/86400,0) | eval hours = round(bucketage/3600,0) |search year>1 |table bucket hours days weeks months years |stats count

table.title: This metric is derived from the last event written to the bucket.

search.query: |inputlookup $field1$.csv |eval timenow=now() |rex field=bucket "db_(?<epoch_end>.+?)_" |eval nowstring=strftime(now(), "%Y-%m-%d") |eval bucketage=timenow-epoch_end | eval years = round(bucketage/31540000,0) | eval months = round(bucketage/2628000,0) | eval weeks = round(bucketage/604800,0) | eval days = round(bucketage/86400,0) | eval hours = round(bucketage/3600,0) |search years>1 |table bucket hours days weeks months years

table.title: This panel displays the age breakdown of each bucket in the selected index. This is not intended to be expressed cummulatively, the largest unit of time measurement should be identified for that bucket. This metric is derived from the last event written to the bucket.

search.query: |inputlookup $field1$.csv |eval timenow=now() |rex field=bucket "db_(?<epoch_end>.+?)_" |eval nowstring=strftime(now(), "%Y-%m-%d") |eval bucketage=timenow-epoch_end | eval years = round(bucketage/31540000,0) | eval months = round(bucketage/2628000,0) | eval weeks = round(bucketage/604800,0) | eval days = round(bucketage/86400,0) | eval hours = round(bucketage/3600,0) |table bucket hours days weeks months years

panel.title: Search Frozen Buckets For Specific Timeframe

table.title: This panel displays the first and last events written to each bucket, creating the timeframe of events the bucket consists of.

search.query: |inputlookup $field1$.csv |rex field=bucket "db_(?<epoch_end>.+?)_" |rex field=bucket "db_\S+\_(?<epoch_start>.+?)_" |eval epoend=strftime(epoch_end, "%Y-%m-%d") |eval epostart=strftime(epoch_start, "%Y-%m-%d") |eval instart="$field2$" |eval inend="$field3$" | eval instart = strptime('instart', "%Y-%m-%d") | eval instart=round(instart,0) | eval inend = strptime('inend', "%Y-%m-%d") | eval inend =round(inend,0) | eval diff1=epoch_end-instart | eval diff2=inend-epoch_start | search diff1>=0 diff2>=0 |table bucket start end
